ec2.launchtemplate.baselineebsbandwidthm: The minimum and maximum baseline bandwidth to Amazon EBS, in Mbps. For more information, see [Amazon EBS–optimized instances](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/ebs-optimized.html) in the *Amazon EC2 User Guide*.

ec2.launchtemplate.baselineebsbandwidthm.Description: The maximum baseline bandwidth, in Mbps. To specify no maximum limit, omit this parameter.
The minimum baseline bandwidth, in Mbps. To specify no minimum limit, omit this parameter.
